---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for ChainsawFire client
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: GP-commits
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Use Case
Explain why this feature would be useful and how it would be used.

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you think this could be implemented (optional).

## Alternatives Considered
A description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or references about the feature request here.
